title: Hariyali Aur Rasta
writer: Dhruva Chatterjee, Qamar Jalalabadi, Moosa Kaleem
actors: Manoj Kumar, Mala Sinha, Shashikala Jawalkar
plot: Shanker and Rita's marriage is finalized by their elders in their childhoods, however, after growing up, Shanker loves Shobna. Shanker is told to marry Rita instead, and he does so. The marriage is rocky as Rita does not pay atten...
